---
title: "Mid-Hudson Regional Community Health Assessment 2025"
jupyter: python3
execute:
  freeze: auto
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
A living, data-driven assessment of the Mid-Hudson Region's health status, priorities, and community conditions.
:::

## Key Indicators (Sample)

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .kpi-card}
::: {.card-body}
### Population
**392,000**

Estimated Mid-Hudson Region population (placeholder).
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .kpi-card}
::: {.card-body}
### Top Priority
**Mental Health**

Region-wide priority from survey findings.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .kpi-card}
::: {.card-body}
### Data Refresh
**Automated**

Excel to charts/tables via `scripts/build_data.py`.
:::
:::
:::
:::

## How to Use This Book

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
::: {.card-body}
### Explore by Chapter
Use the sidebar to navigate demographics, social determinants, clinical care, and environmental conditions.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
::: {.card-body}
### Compare Counties
Tabsets highlight Orange County vs. Mid-Hudson Region vs. NYS benchmarks.
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.callout-important}
This site is an initial draft. Content was converted from a Word document and includes TODO markers for editorial cleanup.
:::
